allow: Bash(echo 'const e = require\("electron"\); console.log\("app:", typeof e.app\); e.app.quit\(\)')
Bash(echo 'const e = require\("electron"\); console.log\("app:", typeof e.app\); if\(e.app\) e.app.quit\(\)')

Bash(echo 'const e = require\("electron"\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(Object.keys\(e\)\)\); if\(e.app\) { e.app.on\("ready", \(\) => { console.log\("ready!"\); e.app.quit\(\); }\); } else { process.exit\(0\); }')
Bash(echo 'const {app, BrowserWindow} = require\("electron"\); app.whenReady\(\).then\(\(\) => { console.log\("Electron is working!"\); app.quit\(\); }\)')
Bash(node -e "const p = require\('electron'\); console.log\('electron path:', p\)")
Bash(node -e "const cp = require\('child_process'\); const p = require\('electron'\); const r = cp.spawnSync\(p, ['--version']\); console.log\(r.stdout?.toString\(\), r.stderr?.toString\(\)\)")
Bash(echo 'const {app} = require\("electron"\); console.log\("app type:", typeof app\); app.whenReady\(\).then\(\(\) => { console.log\("READY"\); app.quit\(\); }\)')

Bash(node -e "const cp = require\('child_process'\); const e = require\('electron'\); const r = cp.spawnSync\(e, ['out/test-pkg'], {stdio:'pipe'}\); console.log\('stdout:', r.stdout?.toString\(\)\); console.log\('stderr:', r.stderr?.toString\(\)?.slice\(0,500\)\)")
